Meadow: ULTRA DENSE   < 3 in³/lb     Gold only — pocket-smugglable
VERY DENSE    3–5 in³/lb     Precious/heavy ores — small parcels
DENSE         5–10 in³/lb    Common ores — bucket and sack transport
MODERATE      10–35 in³/lb   Processed goods — barrel and cask transport
BULKY         35–75 in³/lb   Timber and fiber — cart and pack frame
VERY BULKY    75+ in³/lb     Agricultural/organic — bale and wagon only
